stages.concept:
# Unit 103: 1형식 / 2형식 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 문장의 **1형식**과 **2형식**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **1형식: 주어(S) + 동사(V)**

> Birds **fly**.
> 새들이 날다.

> She **smiled**.
> 그녀는 미소 지었다.

> The baby **is crying**.
> 아기가 울고 있다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 1형식은 주어와 동사만으로 의미가 완성돼요. 부사(구)가 추가되기도 해요.

> He runs **in the park** every morning.
> 그는 매일 아침 공원에서 달린다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **2형식: 주어(S) + 동사(V) + 보어(C)**

> She **is** happy.
> 그녀는 행복하다.

> He **became** a doctor.
> 그는 의사가 되었다.

> The soup **tastes** delicious.
> 그 수프는 맛있다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 2형식에서 보어는 주어를 설명해요. **주어 = 보어** 관계!

> She = happy / He = a doctor / soup = delicious

👩‍🏫 선생님: 2형식 동사: **be, become, get, look, seem, feel, taste, smell, sound** 등

**Q. 다음 문장의 형식을 바르게 연결한 것을 고르세요.**
(A) The baby is crying.
(B) He became a doctor.
1. (A) 1형식, (B) 2형식 ✅
2. (A) 2형식, (B) 1형식
3. (A) 1형식, (B) 3형식

🧑‍🎓 학생: 1형식은 S+V, 2형식은 S+V+C! 주어 = 보어 관계가 핵심이군요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 103: 1형식 2형식 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 알맞은 문장의 형식을 고르시오.
The children are playing. (     )
> **정답** 1형식

---

**02.** She is a good student. ?
> **정답** 2형식

---

**03.** The bird flies high. ?
> **정답** 1형식

---

**04.** He looks happy. ?
> **정답** 2형식

---

**05.** The sun rises in the east. ?
> **정답** 1형식

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 각 성분을 표시하시오.
She is kind.
주어, 동사, 보어를 표시하시오.
> **정답** She(주어) / is(동사) / kind(보어)

---

**07.** The baby sleeps well.
주어, 동사를 표시하시오.
> **정답** The baby(주어) / sleeps(동사)

---

**08.** He became a doctor.
주어, 동사, 보어를 표시하시오.
> **정답** He(주어) / became(동사) / a doctor(보어)

---

**09.** The flowers bloom in spring.
주어, 동사를 표시하시오.
> **정답** The flowers(주어) / bloom(동사)

---

**10.** The soup tastes good.
주어, 동사, 보어를 표시하시오.
> **정답** The soup(주어) / tastes(동사) / good(보어)

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그녀는 행복해 보인다. (2형식)
She happy.
> **정답** looks

---

**12.** 새가 하늘을 난다. (1형식)
The bird in the sky.
> **정답** flies

---

**13.** 그는 선생님이 되었다. (2형식)
He a teacher.
> **정답** became

---

**14.** 비가 내린다. (1형식)
It .
> **정답** rains

---

**15.** 이 꽃은 좋은 냄새가 난다. (2형식)
This flower good.
> **정답** smells

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀는 피곤해 보인다. (2형식)
looks She tired
> **정답** She / looks / tired

---

**17.** 아기가 자고 있다. (1형식)
The is baby sleeping
> **정답** The / baby / is / sleeping

---

**18.** 그 음식은 맛있다. (2형식)
food The delicious is
> **정답** The / food / is / delicious

---

**19.** 해가 뜬다. (1형식)
rises The sun
> **정답** The / sun / rises

---

**20.** 그는 유명해졌다. (2형식)
became He famous
> **정답** He / became / famous
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 103: 1형식  2형식 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 중 문장의 형식이 나머지 셋과 다른 것을 고르시오.
I live alone.
The sun shines.
She is pretty.
Tom sleeps early.
> **정답** She is pretty.

---

**02.** 다음 중 문장의 형식이 나머지 셋과 다른 것을 고르시오.
He is an English teacher.
The leaves turned brown.
I stayed home all day.
She is very skinny.
• skinny 비쩍마른
> **정답** I stayed home all day.

---

**03.** 다음 중 문장의 형식이 나머지 셋과 다른 것을 고르시오.
Tom talks slowly.
The man became quiet.
I lived in London.
She works at the library.
> **정답** The man became quiet.

---

**04.** 다음 중 문장의 형식이 나머지 셋과 다른 것을 고르시오.
Amy acts politely.
The place became famous.
I arrived at the airport on time.
Tom talks fast.
> **정답** The place became famous.

---

**05.** 다음 중 문장의 형식이 나머지 셋과 다른 것을 고르시오.
The leaves turned red and yellow.
They all grew tall.
The kids were noisy.
The event took place on Monday.
• take place 개최되다[일어나다]
> **정답** The event took place on Monday.

---

**06.** 다음 문장에서 보어에 해당하는 말을 찾으시오.
My math teacher is tall and
beautiful.
> **정답** tall and beautiful.

---

**07.** 다음 문장에서 보어에 해당하는 말을 찾으시오.
The little kids are polite.
> **정답** polite.

---

**08.** 다음 문장에서 동사를 고르시오.
My father runs very fast.
> **정답** runs

---

**09.** 다음 문장에서 보어를 [ul]모두[/ul] 고르시오.
She is a good cook. She
cooks cookies. The cookies are
crispy.
• crispy 바삭바삭한
> **정답** a good cook. , crispy.

---

**10.** 다음 <보기>와 같은 형식의 문장을 고르시오.
<보기> Tom waited at the bus stop.
Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius.
The boy became fat in a year.
Tom and Amy were twin brothers.
Her dish looked delicious.
> **정답** Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius.

---

**11.** 다음 <보기>와 같은 형식의 문장을 고르시오.
<보기>The weather is very cold.
The driver drove carefully on the wet road.
He looks happy.
The baby cried all day.
They sat on the chair.
> **정답** He looks happy.

---

**12.** 다음 중 문장의 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 잘못 표기 된 것을
고르시오.
She lives in Seoul. (동사)
My father is tall and handsome. (보어)
He swims very well. (보어)
The birds fly in the sky. (주어)
> **정답** He swims very well. (보어)

---

**13.** 다음 중 문장의 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 잘못 표기 된 것을
고르시오.
The writer became famous. (동사)
All the students were quiet. (부사)
Tom is my math teacher. (보어)
The news was shocking to everyone. (보어)
> **정답** All the students were quiet. (부사)

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
The girls are playing happy in the garden.
Hurry up! You are always so slowly.
He is a firefighter.
The water turned blue.
> **정답** Hurry up! You are always so slowly., The girls are playing happy in the garden.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
The man on my left smiled.
She became quietly.
They are close friends.
They all sat on the bench.
> **정답** She became quietly.

---

**16.** 다음 중 보어가 있는 문장을 고르시오.
The door opened slowly.
She usually gets up at 7 a.m.
English is difficult to me.
The movie will begin soon.
> **정답** English is difficult to me.

---

**17.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Tom was madly at me.
The baby fell asleep.
Skunks smell terribly.
Everything went badly.
> **정답** The baby fell asleep.

---

**18.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
She looks happily on weekends.
Tom is a good teacher.
The weather became warmly.
The pizza smells so well.
> **정답** Tom is a good teacher.

---

**19.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오. [2개]
Tomorrow I have a test, so my plan was to study
until late. But I fell asleep and got up late. My
whole plan went wrongly and I didn't study at
all. It was already 8 a.m. My face turned white
and I grew nervously . I cried.
> **정답** asleep, wrong, white, nervous

---

**20.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오. [2개]
Because the teacher became angrily ,
everyone in the class was quietly . The
students felt a little bit scared . Finally, the
teacher opened her mouth and said, "Keep still
and don't move." Her voice was low and
deep.
> **정답** angry, quiet, scared, low
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 103 1형식  2형식 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
Amy는 가수가 되었다.
Amy  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 became, a, singer

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
그의 부모님은 시카고에 살고 계신다.
  (     )   (     )  in Chicago.
정답 His, parents, live

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
그 기차는 5분 늦게 도착했다.
  (     )   (     )  5 minutes late.
정답 The, train, arrived

---

**04.** 다음 문장을 영작하시오.
여름에 그는 수영한다. [swim, in the summer]
He  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 swims, in, the, summer

---

**05.** 다음 문장을 영작하시오.
Ken은 춤을 잘 춘다. [dance, well]
Ken  (     )   (     ) .
정답 dances, well

---

**06.** 다음 문장을 영작하시오.
그 영화는 아주 흥미롭다. [very, interesting]
The movie  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 is, very, interesting

---

**07.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[The]  [room]  [suddenly]  [became]
[darkly.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 darkly. → dark

---

**08.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[My]  [mom]  [drives]  [very]  [careful.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 careful. → carefully

---

**09.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[The]  [students]  [remained]  [quietly.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 quietly. → quiet

---

**10.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[Peter]  [walked]  [slow]  [around]  [the]
[lake.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 slow → slowly

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 103: 1형식 2형식 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 중 문장의 형식이 나머지 셋과 다른 것을 고르시오.
I live nearby.
The moon shines.
She is kind.
Tom sleeps late.
> 정답: She is kind.

---

**02.** 다음 중 문장의 형식이 나머지 셋과 다른 것을 고르시오.
He is a science teacher.
The leaves turned yellow.
I stayed home all morning.
She is very tall.
> 정답: I stayed home all morning.

---

**03.** 다음 중 문장의 형식이 나머지 셋과 다른 것을 고르시오.
Amy talks quietly.
The sky became dark.
I lived in Tokyo.
She works at the hospital.
> 정답: The sky became dark.

---

**04.** 다음 중 문장의 형식이 나머지 셋과 다른 것을 고르시오.
Tom acts kindly.
The town became popular.
I arrived at the station on time.
Amy talks slowly.
> 정답: The town became popular.

---

**05.** 다음 중 문장의 형식이 나머지 셋과 다른 것을 고르시오.
The flowers turned pink and white.
They all grew strong.
The students were quiet.
The meeting took place on Tuesday.
> 정답: The meeting took place on Tuesday.

---

**06.** 다음 문장에서 보어에 해당하는 말을 찾으시오. My  English  teacher  is  smart  and funny.
> 정답: smart and funny.

---

**07.** 다음 문장에서 보어에 해당하는 말을 찾으시오. The  young  students  are  cheerful.
> 정답: cheerful.

---

**08.** 다음 문장에서 동사를 고르시오.
My  mother  runs  every  morning.
> 정답: runs

---

**09.** 다음 문장에서 보어를 [ul]모두[/ul] 고르시오.
She  is  a  great  singer.  She sings  songs.  The  songs  are  beautiful.
> 정답: a great singer. , beautiful.

---

**10.** 다음 <보기>와 같은 형식의 문장을 고르시오.
<보기> Tom waited at the train station.
Water freezes at 0 degrees Celsius.
The girl became slim in a year.
Amy and Tom were twin sisters.
Her dish smelled delicious.
> 정답: Water freezes at 0 degrees Celsius.

---

**11.** 다음 <보기>와 같은 형식의 문장을 고르시오.
<보기>The weather is very warm.
The driver drove carefully on the icy road.
She looks tired.
The baby laughed all day.
They stood on the stage.
> 정답: She looks tired.

---

**12.** 다음 중 문장의 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 잘못 표기 된 것을 고르시오.
She lives in Busan.
(동사) My mother is kind and gentle. (보어) He runs very fast. (보어) The cats sleep on the sofa. (주어)
> 정답: He runs very fast. (보어)

---

**13.** 다음 중 문장의 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 잘못 표기 된 것을 고르시오.
The artist became popular.
(동사) All the children were noisy. (부사) Tom is my science teacher. (보어) The story was shocking to everyone. (보어)
> 정답: All the children were noisy. (부사)

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) The boys are playing happy in the park.
Hurry up!
You are always so slowly.
He is a pilot.
The sky turned gray.
> 정답: Hurry up! You are always so slowly., The boys are playing happy in the park.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
The woman on my right smiled.
She became silently.
They are good friends.
They all sat on the bench.
> 정답: She became silently.

---

**16.** 다음 중 보어가 있는 문장을 고르시오.
The window opened slowly.
She usually gets up at 6 a.m.
Math is difficult for me.
The concert will begin soon.
> 정답: Math is difficult for me.

---

**17.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Tom was angrily at me.
The baby fell asleep.
Onions smell terribly.
Everything went badly.
> 정답: The baby fell asleep.

---

**18.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
She looks happily on Fridays.
Tom is a good student.
The weather became warmly.
The soup smells so well.
> 정답: Tom is a good student.

---

**19.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오. [2개]
Tomorrow I have a presentation, so my plan was to practice until late.
But I fell asleep and got up late.
My whole plan went wrongly and I didn't practice at all.
It was already 9 a.m.
My face turned pale and I grew nervously .
I panicked.
> 정답: asleep, wrong, pale, nervous

---

**20.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오. [2개]
Because the coach became angrily , everyone on the team was quietly .
The players felt a little bit nervous .
Finally, the coach opened his mouth and said, "Stay still and don't move." His voice was loud and firm.
> 정답: angry, quiet, nervous, loud
